violations.text: Soap was not available at the hand-washing sink in the counter area. Hand-washing sinks must be provided with a supply of hand cleaning liquid, powder, or bar soap. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/17/2024
Container were observed in the hand-washing sink. A hand-washing sink must not be used for purposes other than hand washing. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/17/2024

Raw animal foods (shelled eggs) were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods (produce) in the walk-in refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/17/2024

(Various prepared foods ) was observed not marked with the date of preparation. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation. New Violation. Correct By: 12/17/2024

The door to the outside, located in the (front and back of establishment ), is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 12/20/2024
Inspector observed food be stored in non food grade buckets and single use containers. PIC informed to cease practice. New Violation. Correct By: 12/17/2024
(Chest freezer ) located in the (kitchen) area was not in good repair. Hood doesn't close tightly. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 12/17/2024

Wood is used in the construction of storage shelves in the hot holding area. Non-food contact surfaces of equipment that are exposed to splash, spillage, or other food soiling or that require frequent cleaning must be constructed of a nonabsorbent and smooth material. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 12/17/2024
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the (chlorine ) sanitizing solution for the (3 bay sink ). New Violation. Correct By: 12/20/2024

The non-food contact surfaces of the (steam table shelves, 2 dr reach in, and food storage shelves ) have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 12/20/2024

The floors in basement walk in cooler have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 12/17/2024

Wood is used in the construction of storage shelves in the hot holding area. Non-food contact surfaces of equipment that are exposed to splash, spillage, or other food soiling or that require frequent cleaning must be constructed of a nonabsorbent and smooth material. New Violation. Correct By: 03/26/2024
